---
title: "Activity 2"
format: pdf
editor: visual
author: 
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| warning: FALSE

#Add libraries as needed
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

#Read in Dataset
insurance <- read.csv("insurance_data_S26.csv")
```

priorclaims, sex, age, smoker, BMI

------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r}
#| label: bmi plot
#| echo: False

plot(insurance$charges, insurance$bmi,
     col  = adjustcolor("steelblue", alpha.f = 0.5),
     pch  = 19,
     xlab = "Charges",
     ylab = "BMI",
     main = "BMI vs Charges")






```
```{r}
#| label: validation set approach

set.seed(735)
insurance_index <- sample(
  x = 1:nrow(insurance), 
  size = floor(0.85*nrow(insurance)))
insuranceTrain <- insurance[insurance_index, ]
insuranceValidation <- insurance[-insurance_index, ]
```

```{r}    
#| label: Backward AIC
#| 
Full_Modell <- lm(
  charges ~ .,
  data = insurance)
backward_AIC <- stats::step(object = Full_Model,
            data = insurance,
            direction = "backward",
            k = 2,
            trace = 0)
```
![](images/clipboard-3093701800.png)

```         
```
